# docs(benefits): nested-folder tree structure + reading-order WEIGHTING (Start-Here / Brain / Body)

Part of #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** `learn/benefits/` is 19 flat files with no reading order — Body + Brain benefits jumbled. The single biggest comprehension lever is **structure + WEIGHTING**: how the tree is organized and *what to read in which order*, easy to follow. The portal Learning section already renders nested folders / the `tree.json` structure out of the box (with prev/next) — so this is purely a **content-tree + ordering** task, **no portal code** (verified: `learn/tree.json` is the consumed nav SSOT — SEO generation + the portal read it).

## The target weighted tree (the deliverable)

Weighted by *genuinely-unique-and-ahead* (⭐ = nobody else has it), matching the v13.0.0 hero hierarchy — crown jewels lead, enabling substrate drops below the wow.

```
📍 Start Here
   1. What Is Neo?  (#14313 — the organism + why)
   2. Architecture Overview  (#14315 — two hemispheres + main-areas map; threads the
                              object-permanence-of-identity Body↔Brain symmetry)

🧠 The Brain — the self-evolving AI institution        ← lead with the wow
   3. The AI Engineering Team            (#14320)
   4. ⭐ The Night Shift — autonomous mode (#14331 — runs while you sleep · 10–20 PRs · cross-family quorum)
   5. ⭐ The Golden Path — forecasts the next move (#14318/#14320 — sandman_handoff.md)
   6. Agent Memory & the Native Edge Graph (#14317/#14321 — memory→telepathy · 19k nodes · active GraphRAG)
   7. ⭐ Identity, Rituals & Culture       (#14332 — same model ≠ same agent; object permanence for the Brain;
                                            sunset-handover ≠ sandman_handoff)
   8. Self-Healing — the immune system    (#14322 — runs unattended)
   9. The Agent OS on Your Codebase       (#14316)   →   10. Deploying the Agent OS (#14321/#14324 → cloud path)

🔧 How the institution runs  (enabling substrate — reachable, below the wow)
   · A2A messaging (#14328) · Wakes & hooks / mechanical enforcement (#14329)
   · The core agent skills (#14330) · Model providers: local vs remote (#14323)
   · Coordination bigger-picture (#14331)   · + whatever #14333 (ai/-folder audit) surfaces

🤖 The Body — Application Engine
   Application Engine (#14311 renamed) · Object Permanence (cross-link → Identity #14332) · JSON-First UIs ·
   Off-Main-Thread · Multi-Window · Speed · Forms · Config System · RPC Layer · 4 Environments · Quick Dev ·
   Effort · Features Summary
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Reorganize `learn/benefits/` into **nested folders** the portal renders out-of-the-box — `start-here/`, `brain/`, `body/` — populated + ordered per the target tree above (the ⭐ crown jewels lead the Brain group).
- [ ] `learn/tree.json` reflects the nested structure + the exact reading order (what to read first → last); no broken ids; `hidden`/`collapsed` sane; inbound links to moved docs updated.
- [ ] **Weighting is the deliverable, not just grouping** — the order tells the story (what is Neo → the institution's unique wow → how it runs → the runtime).
- [ ] Coordinates with #14311 (rename → Body), #14313 (new intro = Start-Here #1), #14332 (Identity = Brain crown jewel).

**⚠️ V-B-A grounding (mandatory):** `learn/tree.json` (the SSOT) + how `apps/portal` renders it (confirm folder-driven vs tree.json-driven; SEO gen at `buildScripts/docs/seo/generate.mjs` consumes it) + the full `learn/benefits/` inventory. Driver: @neo-opus-grace.

**Note:** absorbs the (closed) #14314 — the portal already renders the nested tree + prev/next; the work is the tree structure + weighting it renders.

### @neo-opus-grace - 2026-06-29T11:34:42Z

## #14312 design — weighted nested IA for `learn/benefits/` (owner spec, Grace)

**V-B-A of current state (2026-06-29):** 19 flat `.md` files; `tree.json` has all 19 as direct children of the `Benefits` node — **no sub-structure**. Each classified below by its real H1.

### The 3 groups + weighted reading order (comprehension-first)

**Start Here** — the front door: *what is this + the map*
1. `WhatIsNeo` (NEW, #14313) — the organism, made vivid (the spine)
2. `ArchitectureOverview` (#14315) — the two-hemisphere map (Body + Brain; local vs cloud)

**The Brain — Agent OS** — the moat, **weighted highest, ahead of the Body**
1. `AIEngineeringTeam` — the cross-family institution
2. `SelfEvolution` — Dream Pipeline / Golden Path (crown jewel)
3. `AgentMemory` — Memory Core + the Native Edge Graph
4. `AgentOSOnYourCodebase` — apply it to YOUR repo (the "what's in it for you"; this is the 2/10 file → needs the bar rewrite)
5. `DeployingTheAgentOS` — local vs cloud (downstream payoff)
   → Deep-dives stay in `agentos/` (self-healing #14322, model-provider #14323, identity-firewall #14335, coordination/night-shift #14331, rituals #14332). The Brain group **links into** them; it doesn't absorb them.

**The Body — Application Engine** — hero-benefit order
1. `ApplicationEngine` (renamed from `Introduction`, #14311) — the engine intro
2. `ObjectPermanence` — hero Body benefit
3. `OffTheMainThread` — the multi-threaded core
4. `MultiWindow`
5. `JSONFirstUIs` — LLM-friendly (bridges to the Brain)
6. `Speed`
7. `FourEnvironments`
8. `ConfigSystem`
9. `RPCLayer`
10. `FormsEngine`

### ⚠️ Weighting ≠ grouping — consolidation flags (owner call)
Three files are **legacy generic web-dev value-props** that dilute the moat and clash with the narrative-arc rubric:
- `Features` ("Features and Benefits Summary") — a **feature list**, the exact anti-pattern the rubric bans → **retire or fold** into the Body intro.
- `Quick` ("Quick Application Development") + `Effort` ("Complexity and Effort") — overlapping rapid-dev / complexity value-props → **consolidate** into one Body dev-experience beat (or fold into `ApplicationEngine` / `Speed`).
- Recommendation: do **not** carry all three into the new tree as-is — consolidating is what makes the weighting actually elevate the moat instead of burying it under generic prose.

### Implementation — phased (KISS, low-risk first)
- **Phase 1 (this PR) — `tree.json` only.** Add 3 folder nodes (`isLeaf:false`, `parentId:"Benefits"`) + reparent each leaf to its group in the order above. The portal renders nested folders + prev/next from this **out of the box** — no portal code. **No file moves → zero cross-link / inbound-link breakage.** Validate with `npm run ai:lint-tree-json`.
- **Phase 2 (optional follow-up) — physical folder moves** (`benefits/start-here/`, `benefits/brain/`, `benefits/body/`) only if the on-disk layout justifies the link-update cost. Flagged, not assumed.

### Execution-ready tree.json (Phase 1)
Insert 3 folder nodes under `Benefits`:
```json
{ "name": "Start Here",                 "parentId": "Benefits", "isLeaf": false, "id": "benefits/start-here" },
{ "name": "The Brain — Agent OS",       "parentId": "Benefits", "isLeaf": false, "id": "benefits/brain" },
{ "name": "The Body — Application Engine","parentId": "Benefits","isLeaf": false, "id": "benefits/body" }
```
Then set each leaf's `parentId` (id + file path UNCHANGED in Phase 1) and emit in this order:
- → `benefits/start-here`: `benefits/WhatIsNeo` (new), `benefits/ArchitectureOverview`
- → `benefits/brain`: `benefits/AIEngineeringTeam`, `benefits/SelfEvolution`, `benefits/AgentMemory`, `benefits/AgentOSOnYourCodebase`, `benefits/DeployingTheAgentOS`
- → `benefits/body`: `benefits/ApplicationEngine` (renamed), `benefits/ObjectPermanence`, `benefits/OffTheMainThread`, `benefits/MultiWindow`, `benefits/JSONFirstUIs`, `benefits/Speed`, `benefits/FourEnvironments`, `benefits/ConfigSystem`, `benefits/RPCLayer`, `benefits/FormsEngine`
- (`Features` / `Quick` / `Effort`: hold out of the tree pending the consolidation decision above.)

Sequencing: Phase 1 depends on #14311 (Introduction→ApplicationEngine rename) + #14313 (WhatIsNeo) landing the file ids; the tree edit can go in the same PR or immediately after.

— Grace (@neo-opus-grace), epic owner 🖖


### @neo-opus-grace - 2026-06-29T17:19:10Z

## V-B-A grounding (the ticket's mandatory grounding) — @neo-opus-grace

**Rendering model:** `learn/tree.json` is the consumed nav SSOT — entries are path-referenced (`benefits/<Slug>`), read by the portal + SEO gen (`buildScripts/docs/seo/generate.mjs`). The reading-order + nesting render from tree.json; the AC's nested **folders** (`start-here/` / `brain/` / `body/`) therefore require file-moves (paths become `benefits/start-here/<Slug>` …) + tree.json path updates + inbound-link fixes.

**⚠️ Dependency-blocked — sequences near-last.** The target weighted tree places guides that **don't exist yet**, so restructuring now would create exactly the broken ids the AC forbids:
- `WhatIsNeo.md` (#14313 — Start-Here #1) — **missing**
- `ApplicationEngine.md` (#14311 — rename of `Introduction.md`) — **missing** (`Introduction.md` still present)
- `NightShift.md` (#14331 — Brain crown jewel) — **missing**
- `IdentityRitualsCulture.md` (#14332 — Brain crown jewel) — **missing**

**Sequencing call (mine, as driver):** #14312 executes **after** its constituent subs land (#14313, #14311, #14331, #14332 + the Brain/Body guides) — like #14327, this is a sequence-near-last task. Executing earlier violates the no-broken-ids AC and collides with the in-flight guide renames/creations. Grounding is done; the lane is execution-ready the moment the constituent guides are in. 🖖 — Grace
